name: Bandwidth Anomaly Investigation
description: Investigates anomalous bandwidth consumption that may indicate data exfiltration, cryptomining, unauthorized media streaming, or compromised hosts participating in botnets. Riggs AI analyzes traffic flow data to classify the bandwidth spike by type and risk. Potential exfiltration triggers traffic throttling, host investigation, and SOC escalation. Non-malicious bandwidth abuse is documented and routed to the appropriate team for policy enforcement.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Palo Alto NGFW
required_integrations.reason: Apply QoS throttling and traffic shaping to contain bandwidth abuse

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Investigate endpoint processes responsible for abnormal traffic

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify SOC of potential exfiltration or bandwidth abuse

config.description: Triggers when network monitoring detects abnormal bandwidth consumption significantly exceeding the baseline for a host, user, or segment

config.additional_instructions: Analyze traffic flow data: top destinations by volume, protocol distribution, time pattern, source process/application, and comparison to historical baseline. Classify as potential exfiltration, cryptomining, media streaming, backup traffic, or other. Assess exfiltration risk.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of traffic flow data to classify the bandwidth anomaly type and assess data exfiltration risk
Routes based on whether the bandwidth anomaly indicates potential data exfiltration versus non-malicious bandwidth abuse
Applies QoS throttling to the suspicious egress traffic to slow potential data exfiltration while investigation continues

config.additional_instructions: Investigate the source endpoint: identify the process generating the traffic, check for data staging behavior, recently accessed sensitive files, running services, and any malware indicators. Determine what data may have been exfiltrated.
config.description: AI-powered endpoint investigation to identify the process responsible for abnormal traffic and assess data exposure
Sends critical exfiltration alert to the SOC with traffic details, endpoint investigation results, and throttling status
Documents non-malicious bandwidth abuse and routes to the appropriate team (IT for streaming, infra for backups, etc.)
